generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor (I_M) measuring the armature current of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorStreamMQTT
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder providing the angular position of the motor shaft."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorStreamMQTT
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox rear position encoder capturing the angular position of the gearbox output."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorStreamMQTT
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance RobotSensorStreamMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data – Input data for the simulation
instance CurrentSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor current transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorStreamMQTT
]

instance MotorPosSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor shaft angular position time‑series derived from the motor position encoder."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorStreamMQTT
]

instance GearboxPosSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox output angular position time‑series derived from the gearbox position encoder."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorStreamMQTT
]

instance TorqueSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Joint torque time‑series computed from sensor data streams."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorStreamMQTT
]

instance VelocitySignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Joint angular velocity time‑series derived from differentiated position data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorStreamMQTT
]

instance AccelerationSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Joint angular acceleration time‑series derived from differentiated velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorStreamMQTT
]

// C10: Models/Data – Simulated outputs
instance SimulatedMotorPosData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor shaft angular position from the motor model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedOutputSignalData
]

instance SimulatedGearboxPosData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox output angular position from the gearbox model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedOutputSignalData
]

instance SimulatedOutputPosData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated overall joint output angular position from the complete kinematic chain."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnvironment
]

instance SimulatedOutputSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output signals (torque, position, velocity, etc.) from the Simulink simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnvironment
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated joint torque derived from the friction and dynamics models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedOutputSignalData
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated joint angular velocity from the simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedOutputSignalData
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SimulinkEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink execution environment used to run motor, gearbox, and friction models."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionModelProvisionService, ActiveDigitalTwinControlService
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for creating structural diagrams of the axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating real‑time streaming of live sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService
]

instance AssetAdminShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing metadata and configuration of the axis assets."
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetGovernanceService
]

instance DashboardTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualizing joint states, simulation results, and diagnostic insights."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring and visualization of live and simulated joint states."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeJointStateInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous online identification of joint friction parameters for the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelUpdateInsight, WearDetectionInsight, MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight
]

instance FrictionModelProvisionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provision of updated friction models to the motor and controller."
    DTDFVocab:provides ProvideUpdatedFrictionModelAction
]

instance ActiveDigitalTwinControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Active digital‑twin control service enabling closed‑loop use of the updated friction models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlImprovementAction
]

// C11: Additional services (enable by other enablers)
instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for creating SysML structural diagrams of the axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides SysMLModelInsight
]

instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for collecting MQTT sensor streams."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataCollectionInsight
]

instance AssetGovernanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing AAS metadata and asset configuration."
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetGovernanceInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for visualizing data and insights on the dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides VizInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance RealTimeJointStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating the current live and simulated joint states for monitoring."
]

instance FrictionModelUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing updated static, kinetic, and viscous friction parameters."
]

instance WearDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight identifying wear or tool changes in the gearbox or motor."
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight suggesting controller tuning adjustments based on friction identification."
]

instance SysMLModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming the integrity of the SysML structural model."
]

instance DataCollectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on the robustness and completeness of collected sensor streams."
]

instance AssetGovernanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on compliance and integrity of AAS metadata."
]

instance VizInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing the adequacy of dashboard visualizations."
]

// C17: Actions
instance ProvideUpdatedFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically provide updated friction parameters to the GBM controller."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically adjust controller gains based on friction diagnostics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time data exchange and model updates; sensor data streamed at the robot controller’s sampling rate (typically >100 Hz) and processed immediately for friction estimation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Consists of the physical asset (first axis), its engineering SysML model, the processing component executing simulation and friction models, data traces from sensors and simulations, metadata, and a dashboard for visualization—all orchestrated as a single digital shadow capturing friction dynamics."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated phase (runtime data collection and friction model refinement during robot operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity established by cross‑validation of simulated versus measured torque and velocity traces; use of both white‑box analytical friction models and black‑box data‑driven models; traceability of every data point to its source and computing model; ongoing refinement mitigates modeling errors due to wear, load, and temperature effects."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow using MQTT over an unspecified industrial Ethernet link within the robot’s network. The digital shadow processes these streams locally."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Utilizes industry de‑facto standards: SysML for modeling, MQTT protocol for communication, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset‑centric metadata."
]
